<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The goal `O` is at row 04 column D. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column C, which is safe. This keeps me moving toward the goal while avoiding the lava at row 03 column C.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column C facing right. Moving forward would take me to row 02 column D, which is safe and brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. 
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing right, and the cell in front of me is a wall at column E. I cannot move forward. To go toward the goal at row 04 column D, I should turn clockwise to face down, then I can move toward the goal on the next step.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column D facing down. The cell directly in front of me is row 03 column D, which is safe, and moving there brings me closer to the goal at row 04 column D. So the best next action is to move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column D facing down. The goal is directly ahead at row 04 column D, and that cell is safe. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
